infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera App needs access to your camera to take photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Camera App needs access to your microphone to record videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Camera App needs access to your photo library to save and view photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Camera App needs permission to save photos to your library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Camera App to access your camera.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Camera App to access your microphone.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Camera App to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Camera App to save photos.
